items.evidenceExcerpt: s of Interest has been issued. The consulting services (hereinafter – the Services) include: • developing teaching and learning materials (hereinafter referred to as “TLM”) for the first cycle/year of upper secondary education (Grade 10); • upgrading the MoES digital repository for TLM storage and use by expanding the repository’s capacity, as well as updating the User Manual for the repository; • developing, publishing, and disseminating hard copies of the Manuals on TLM; • conducting training for TLM users; and • organizing a final event for dissemination of the results. The expected period for the Consultant’s provision of the Services is approximately 12 calendar months from the date of contract signing. The Government of Mozambique, through the Ministry of Communications and Digital Transformation (MCTD), has received financing from the World Bank for the implementation of the Mozambique Digital Acceleration Project (MDAP), and intends to apply part of the funds to hire a firm to provide Training for Persons with Visual Impairments (Blind and Low Vision) in Mozambique on the Use of Information and Communication Technologies (ICTs). 2. The consultancy services (“the Services”) are intended, in the first phase, to train 847 persons with visual impairments (blind and low vision)
